# Agenta Plugin

> Modular MCP plugin collection for Claude Code. Pick a profile, get a curated set of MCP servers and skills.

## Profiles

- core: Essential MCPs (sandbox, memory, reasoning, HTTP)
- knowledge-base: RAG pipelines, vector search, document management
- research: Multi-source search, scraping, synthesis
- web-dev: Full-stack development with browser automation
- blockchain: Solana development with Helius, Jupiter, Twitter
- full: Everything combined

## Quick Start

    bash install.sh

Or copy a template:

    cp templates/core.mcp.json .mcp.json

## Repository

- profiles/ - Profile manifests defining MCP and skill composition
- mcps/ - Individual MCP server configurations
- skills/ - Skill markdown files with YAML frontmatter
- templates/ - Ready-to-copy .mcp.json files
- docs/ - Extended documentation (guide.md for use cases and user flows)

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/superteam-brasil/agenta
- MCP Protocol: https://modelcontextprotocol.io
- Claude Code: https://claude.ai/code
